lesson_snippet.concept_explanation: Letters are symbols that represent sounds. We use letters and sounds to read and write words.
lesson_snippet.visual_model: Uppercase and lowercase letter pairs with picture cues.
lesson_snippet.common_misconception: Confusing letter names with sounds or mixing similar letters.
lesson_snippet.lesson_summary: Letters make sounds that help us read words.

worked_example.problem: What sound does the letter M make?
worked_example.reflection_prompt: Can I think of a word with /m/?

hint_ladder.hint_3: Think about the sound it makes.

next_practice_recommendation.reason: Converted planning artifact only; runtime pathway mapping pending.

source_metadata.source_file: Grade 1 English Production Reading Foundations Skill 1 Letter Recognition + Letter Sounds (Phonics Foundation)
